sylph_db.help_text: Path to a pre-built Sylph database (.syldb).

sylph_tax_metadata.help_text: Path to the sylph-tax metadata TSV to use for taxprof.

sylph_method.help_text: Sylph command to use for reference selection. Choices: query, profile.

taxonomic_grouping.help_text: Taxonomic rank by which to group references. Choices: domain, kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species.

expand_refs.help_text: Expand reference list to all genomes available for taxonomic groups extracted from sylph-tax profiling.

remove_taxo_suffix.help_text: Remove the alphabetic suffix from the end of taxonomic groups when expand_refs is enabled. May be useful if you do not wish to use the clusters of GTDB (see https://gtdb.ecogenomic.org/faq#why-do-some-genus-and-species-names-end-with-an-alphabetic-suffix).

genome_id_to_file.help_text: File from which to extract genome paths based on genome identifiers (required for if expand_refs is enabled).
